description: Browse the competitive-analysis research library and start evidence-backed product teardowns.

commands.description: Report app health: whether the research skill is bundled, which local agent providers are detected, the default provider, library counts, and whether the Tutti CLI bridge is reachable.
List research conversations, most recently updated first, optionally filtered by a title or product-name substring.

query.description: Case-insensitive substring to match against session title or product name.

limit.description: Maximum number of sessions to return (default 50).

offset.description: Number of sessions to skip from the start for pagination (default 0).

commands.description: List captured research artifacts (report.md, inventory.md, meta.json, raw evidence) across all sessions or within one session, with ids usable by the report command.

session.description: Restrict results to a single session id.

query.description: Case-insensitive substring to match against artifact title, summary, session title, or product name.

limit.description: Maximum number of artifacts to return (default 50).

offset.description: Number of artifacts to skip from the start for pagination (default 0).

commands.description: Return the full content (Markdown or JSON) of a single captured artifact, identified by its session id and artifact id from the reports command.

session.description: Session id that owns the artifact.

artifact.description: Artifact id from the reports command.

commands.description: Kick off an evidence-backed product teardown with the local agent. Returns immediately with a session id and run id; poll the sessions or reports commands for results.

product.description: Product to research, or a full research prompt.

session.description: Optional existing session id to continue; a new session is created when omitted.

provider.description: Local agent provider override (e.g. claude or codex).

model.description: Model override for the chosen provider.
